description: You are a senior medical writer at Heliogen Therapeutics. Following an unblinded Data Safety Monitoring Board (DSMB) review of the HELI-CARD-201 Phase II trial, update the protocol document (/home/ga/Documents/protocol_v1.docx) to Version 2.0 and save it as /home/ga/Documents/protocol_v2.docx. The update requires changing the document header on all pages to Version 2.0 dated 15 March 2024 and adding a final exclusion criterion to Section 5: 'Screening QTc interval greater than 450 ms (males) or 470 ms (females) as measured by 12-lead ECG', maintaining the existing numbering style.
